title: (Bullish Signal) TWLO, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling TWLO's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 43 similar cases where TWLO's MACD histogram became positive, and 38 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 88%. Current price $398.90 is above $355.66 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 01/04/21 - 02/04/21, the price experienced a +19% Uptrend. During the week of 01/28/21 - 02/04/21, the stock enjoyed a +11% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/loc8y6dt0pf61.png?width=1534&format=png&auto=webp&s=144af7c23de1877b2388d255bd00ad3aa848f859

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on February 04, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on TWLO as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 56 of 70 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for TWLO just turned positive on February 04, 2021. Looking at past instances where TWLO's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 38 of 43 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

The 10-day Moving Average for TWLO crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on October 05, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 8 of 10 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

Following a +3.16% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where TWLO advanced for three days, in 276 of 322 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

TWLO may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 235 of 276 cases where TWLO Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 85%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9127478-arna-is-predicted-to-rise-to-a-target-price-of-84-15?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
